title: US judge orders removal of Trump's name from Kennedy Center
description: Judge rules that Washington DC performing arts venue cannot be renamed without an act of Congress
content:
A judge on Friday ordered the removal of Donald Trump’s name from the Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts, ruling that the prestigious Washington DC venue cannot be renamed without an act of Congress.

title: French Open 2026 results: Novak Djokovic beaten by Joao Fonseca in third-round thriller
description: Novak Djokovic's wait for a record 25th Grand Slam singles title goes on after teenager Joao Fonseca produces a stunning fightback to win a five-set epic in the French Open third round.
content:
Novak Djokovic's wait for a record 25th Grand Slam singles title goes on after teenage star Joao Fonseca produced a stunning fightback to win a five-set epic in the French Open third round.

title: ‘It was too easy’: families ask how Kenneth Law enabled so many suicides
description: Bereaved relatives say they were ignored by authorities as they searched for answers over suicide forums and kits
content: Monday would have been Aimee Walton’s 25th birthday. But in 2022, the lover of music and art from Southampton took her own life after being groomed by another user on an online forum that glorified and enabled suicide. On Friday, 3,500 miles away, th... [8821 chars]

title: Israel put on UN sexual violence in warzones blacklist for first time
description: Israel says it rejects allegations in a new report by the office of the UN secretary general.
content:
Israel has been added to a UN blacklist of countries that commit sexual violence in warzones for the first time.
A report by the office of Secretary General António Guterres said the UN had last year verified 31 cases of sexual violence perpetrated b... [4071 chars]

title: First of five men found alive in flooded Laos cave rescued
description: The bedraggled man was led to safety by rescuers after nine days stranded in the cavern
content:
The first of five men found alive after spending more than a week trapped inside a flooded cave in Laos has been freed.
